svg.title: RTPS Real-Time Payment Settlement System - Enhanced Architecture
svg.desc: Enhanced architecture showing Async Webhook Handshake, Race Condition Defense, and HMAC Security layers.
svg.text: ✓ Idempotency: HTTP Header + 24h expiry ✓ Encryption: AES-256 ✓ Rate Limiting: Resilience4j

g.text: Wait & Retry (500ms) for Race Conditions | HMAC-SHA256 Sig Verification | REQUIRES_NEW Audit
5s timeout → HTTP 409 Conflict → PENDING_RETRY | Lock Timeout Monitoring Table
Wait & Retry (500ms) for too-fast webhooks arriving before DB commit
HMAC-SHA256 signature calculated with shared secret for every notification
Independent logging transactions (REQUIRES_NEW) to track all webhook attempts
SELECT FOR UPDATE, 5s timeout, preventing double-debit under high load
Outbox → Eager Publish → Kafka DLT → Retry Scheduler → Circuit Breaker
End-to-End X-Correlation-ID tracing in MDC Logs and Kafka Headers
